title: docs(ci): CI-RED-004 docs-only fence witness — prove Fence Checks (Blocking) runs + passes on a docs-only PR before requiring the check
intent: Branch-protection enforcement witness. PR #194 (merged fa18d72a) removed the path filters from architecture_scan.yml so 'Fence Checks (Blocking)' runs on every PR. Before that check is added to required status checks on main, we must prove a docs-only PR (touching none of the pre-#194 filtered paths) still triggers 'Architecture Scan (Non-Blocking)' and reports a green fence. A path-filtered required check is a self-DoS: on any PR that skips the workflow the required check never reports and the PR is blocked forever on 'Expected — waiting'. This PR is that witness: it changes only a docs/handoffs record and this CBSP21 manifest — neither path was in the old filter (services/api, packages/client, contracts, docker, scripts, .github/workflows). This PR does NOT require the fence and does NOT close CI-RED-004/021; it is a time-bound witness for the exact check name 'Fence Checks (Blocking)'. CI-RED-004 closes only after that check is required on main. CI-RED-021 closes only after the wider branch-protection/ruleset + CODEOWNERS enforcement bar is verified.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) docs/handoffs/CI_RED_004_FENCE_REQUIRED_WITNESS.md: new witness record documenting why a docs-only fence witness is required before requiring the check, with the observed Architecture Scan / Fence Checks (Blocking) result on PR #195 and explicit limits: the witness is time-bound, exact-check-name dependent, and not a branch-protection audit. (2) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest declaring the docs-only change. No product, application, or CI-logic change.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: This is the load-bearing proof that removing the path filters (PR #194) actually lets a docs-only PR report the fence verdict. Without an observed green fence on a filter-missing diff, adding 'Fence Checks (Blocking)' to required checks risks bricking every future docs-only PR.

commands_run: local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py --base origin/main --head HEAD -> PASS (selects this manifest)
local: python scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --changed-files <origin/main...HEAD files> -> 100% coverage PASS
CI witness (the point of this PR): Architecture Scan (Non-Blocking) starts on this docs-only diff; architecture-scan + 'Fence Checks (Blocking)' both green on run 28739849213

files.intent: Witness record: prove a docs-only PR triggers Architecture Scan and 'Fence Checks (Blocking)' passes, gating the future required-check change.
Per-PR CBSP21 manifest declaring this docs-only witness change.
